home.label: Document translation · Karshi
home.description: Clear document translation with careful formatting and notary approval support when you need it.
home.aboutPreviewTitle: A small team making important documents feel less complicated.
home.aboutPreviewDescription: Every passport, diploma, certificate, and official paper carries a real next step in someone’s life. We take that seriously, while keeping the process calm and clear.
home.worksPreviewTitle: Clear prices. Careful work. Official-looking results.

stats.label: Numbers with real people behind them
stats.description: Behind every number is a student, a family, a traveler, or someone preparing for their next opportunity.
stats.branchesDetail: Two convenient locations for document translation and notary-related support.
stats.customersDetail: People who trusted us with documents that mattered to them.
stats.documentsDetail: Prepared carefully for everyday, academic and official needs.
stats.bottomNote: Your document is not just another paper. We treat it that way.

works.pageDescription: Browse common document categories, starting prices and example layouts. If your document is not listed, send us a request anyway — we will help you find the right path.
works.noteText: No problem. Send a request with a photo or short description. We will review it and tell you what is needed before work begins.

passport.title: Passport translation
passport.description: Clear translation of passport details with careful spelling, formatting and official document structure.

diploma.title: Diploma translation
diploma.description: Translation of diplomas, transcripts and education-related documents for study, work and applications.

birthCertificate.title: Birth certificate translation
birthCertificate.description: Accurate translation of birth certificates with names, dates, seals and document formatting preserved.

marriageCertificate.title: Marriage certificate translation
marriageCertificate.description: Carefully prepared translation for marriage certificates and family-status documents.

schoolCertificate.title: School certificate translation
schoolCertificate.description: Translation of school certificates, grade records and supporting education documents.

drivingLicense.title: Driving licence translation
drivingLicense.description: Formatted translation of driving licences for travel, applications and official use.

medicalCertificate.title: Medical certificate translation
medicalCertificate.description: Careful translation of medical certificates and supporting documents while keeping the original structure clear.

powerOfAttorney.title: Power of attorney translation
powerOfAttorney.description: Translation of powers of attorney and legal documents with attention to names, dates and formal wording.

other.title: Other document
other.description: Have a document that is not listed? Send us a photo or description and we will review the best option for you.

about.pageDescription: We are a Karshi-based translation center focused on documents that need to be clear, accurate and ready for real-life use. Whether you are applying, traveling, studying, working, or handling legal paperwork, our job is to make the language part easier.
about.quote: A good translation should give you confidence before you hand over your documents.

values.accuracyText: Names, dates, stamps and formatting matter. We check the details that cannot be guessed.
values.trustText: We explain what is needed, what it costs and what happens next without unnecessary confusion.
values.careText: You can ask questions. We are here to make a document process feel manageable.

about.journeyOneText: Tell us what document you have, which languages are needed and whether notary approval is required.
about.journeyTwoText: We confirm the scope, timing and price so you know exactly what to expect.
about.journeyThreeText: Your translation is prepared with care for the next step you are taking.

form.label: Online order
form.success: Your request is ready to send. We will contact you shortly.
form.responseNote: We usually respond as soon as possible.
form.helpTitle: A clear start for your document.
form.helpText: Send the basics first. If we need a photo, scan, or more details, we will let you know.
form.notaryNote: Translation of documents with notary approval support.
form.pageDescription: Fill in the form with the basics. We will help you turn a document question into a clear plan.

footer.description: Clear, careful document translation for the steps that matter.
footer.notaryNote: Document translation with notary approval support.
